headline: Incyte Nears Buy Point As $1.25 Billion Acquisition Expands Offerings

headline: Is FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Now Attractive After A 40% Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether FactSet Research Systems at around US$249 per share is offering good value or asking too much, the starting point is to look closely at what the current price really reflects. The stock has been volatile, with the price up about 13.6% over the past month but down about 12.6% year to date and down about 40.2% over the last year. This kind of movement can change how investors think about both risk and opportunity. Recent coverage has focused on how FactSet Research...
